title: struthiopteris triloba
intro: Struthiopteris triloba, also known as the ferny horsetail or fern-leaved horsetail, is a type of plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as a diuretic. The herbal preparations of Struthiopteris triloba include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
